title: viburnum scabrellum
intro: Viburnum scabrellum, also known as the scabron, is a perennial shrub native to North America, characterized by its compound leaves and clusters of white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Viburnum scabrellum include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. Viburnum scabrellum is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
